Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

Hello,
With ingress coming, I don't really see the value add of MSB, particularly for intra kubernetes communication.
Could you at least propose a switch (global.msb.enabled) to use msb or not for your communications?
I tried to add Chaker but couldn't find him in the reviewers list

Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

I agree with Sylvain's feedback. MSB is not the only communication bus. Having the capability to make it optional is the right way to move forward. Thanks

Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

(1 comment)

Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

I also strongly support Sylvain point of view, please make msb optional

Patch Set 5: Code-Review+1

@Sylvain, Krzysztof, Catherine, Seshu - as you saw our email exchange, we'd like to handle the optional MSB configuration separately from this check in. After this checkin we'd like to discuss the configuration option and create a new use case or user story to fix it altogether. Hope this works with you.
